title: QGSD Conformance Event
description: Schema for events in .planning/conformance-events.jsonl. MCPENV-03: extended with MCP interaction metadata fields.

action.description: Event action type (quorum_start, quorum_complete, quorum_block, deliberation_round, mcp_call, ...)

phase.description: XState machine phase (IDLE, COLLECTING_VOTES, DELIBERATING, DECIDED)

slots_available.description: Number of quorum slots available in this round

outcome.description: Quorum outcome (APPROVE, BLOCK) — not to be confused with mcp_outcome

schema_version.description: Version of the conformance event schema

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this MCP call (format: round:slot:attempt, e.g. round1:codex-1:1). Required for mcp_call events.

peer.description: MCP slot name (e.g. codex-1, gemini-1, opencode-1). Required for mcp_call events.

mcp_outcome.description: Result of MCP call attempt. Required for mcp_call events. Not to be confused with quorum outcome field.

attempt.description: Retry attempt number (1 = first attempt, 2 = first retry, ...). Required for mcp_call events.
